productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Subtle and stylish, this black t-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The stylish branding across the chest enhances your royal fashion statement, while the short sleeves contour your well-toned arms perfectly. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
